{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/145779217?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dremig/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dremig/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dremig/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dremig/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Dremig", "id": 145779217, "login": "Dremig", "node_id": "U_kgDOCLBqEQ", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dremig/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dremig/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dremig/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dremig/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dremig/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dremig", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-65591", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:L/UI:N/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:H/SI:H/SA:L"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-917", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an Expression Language Statement ('Expression Language Injection')"}], "description": "## Impact
The legacy expression evaluator's computed-member sanitizer can be bypassed by an authenticated user with workflow create or modify permissions. Successful exploitation grants the attacker host-level code execution as the n8n process.

The legacy expression engine is the default engine in affected versions.

## Patches
The issue has been fixed in n8n versions 1.123.64, 2.29.8, and 2.30.1. Users should upgrade to one of these versions or later to remediate the vulnerability.

## Workarounds
If upgrading is not immediately possible, administrators should consider the following temporary mitigations:
- Restrict n8n instance access to fully trusted users only.
- Switch to the non-legacy expression engine by setting `N8N_EXPRESSION_ENGINE=vm`.

These workarounds do not fully remediate the risk and should only be used as short-term mitigation measures.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-pm35-fqvh-cq5g", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-22T22:02:04Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-pm35-fqvh-cq5g", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-pm35-fqvh-cq5g"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-65591"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-22T22:02:04Z", "references": ["https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/security/advisories/GHSA-pm35-fqvh-cq5g", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-65591", "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/releases/tag/n8n@1.123.64", "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/releases/tag/n8n@2.29.8", "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/releases/tag/n8n@2.30.1", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/n8n-before-sanitizer-bypass-remote-code-execution", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-pm35-fqvh-cq5g"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/n8n-io/n8n/security-advisories/GHSA-pm35-fqvh-cq5g", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n", "summary": "n8n: Legacy Expression Evaluator Sanitizer Bypass Leads to Authenticated Code Execution", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-22T22:02:05Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-pm35-fqvh-cq5g", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.123.64", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.123.64"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.30.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.30.0, < 2.30.1"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.29.8", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.0.0-rc.0, < 2.29.8"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: n8n: Legacy Expression Evaluator Sanitizer Bypass Leads to Authenticated Code Execution
